data.title: Cardano Rallies Toward $0.42 as Institutional Access and Derivatives Fuel Move
data.description:
Cardano is trading higher after a sharp 24-hour advance that pushed ADA back toward the $0. 42 level. The token was last seen around $0. 4219, reflecting roughly a 3% daily gain as momentum picked up across spot and derivatives markets
source: https://www.ethnews.com/cardano-rallies-toward-0-42-as-institutional-access-and-derivatives-fuel-move/

data.title: Bitcoin price reclaims $97K, bulls eye $100K milestone
data.description:
Bitcoin climbed above $97k on a risk-on outlook Gains have also come as Bitcoin ETFs notch huge inflows. Risks include geopolitical escalations. Bitcoin is surging once again after a slow start in 2026, with the latest spike sending BTC to highs of $97,360 amid renewed risk-on sentiment across global markets
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/bitcoin-price-reclaims-97k-bulls-eye-100k-milestone/

data.title: Figure Technology launches on‑chain public equity network for blockchain stock issuance
data.description:
Figure is rolling out a new way for companies to sell stock using blockchain rails instead of the old market plumbing. The blockchain-based lender said it is launching a platform that enables firms to issue on-chain equity, while allowing investors to lend shares directly to one another. No clearinghouses. No retail brokers. No long chain […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/figure-on%e2%80%91chain-public-equity-network/

data.title: Figure unveils onchain equity network aimed at remaking stock trading and lending
data.description:
Figure’s OPEN platform is designed to handle issuance, settlement, and stock lending onchain, instead of replicating existing stock trading.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/385595/figure-onchain-equity-network-aimed-remaking-stock-trading-lending?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Starknet responded to Solana's teasing about its low activity level: "Who gave the data to this little brother Solana?"
data.description: Solana previously posted on the X platform that Starknet, with only 8 daily active users and 10 daily transactions, still boasts a $1 billion market capitalization and $15 billion FDV. Starknet responded, "Who told this little brother of Solana these figures?" Starknet CEO Eli Ben-Sasson also responded, "Solana has 8 marketing interns (all bald) who post 10 tweets a day." Solana co-founder Toly responded, "This is an unnecessary brawl between bald CEOs."

data.title: Why US community banks say the GENIUS Act has a stablecoin loophole
data.description:
Banks argue that stablecoin rewards offered through exchanges exploit a GENIUS Act loophole, blurring the line between payment tokens and savings accounts.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/why-us-community-banks-say-the-genius-act-has-a-stablecoin-loophole?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Sui Mainnet Stalls as Network Disruption Halts Block Production
data.description:
The Sui mainnet is experiencing a network disruption that has temporarily halted block production, bringing on-chain activity to a standstill. Official communications confirm the issue, with some network explorers showing no new checkpoints generated for more than an hour, disrupting normal transaction flow. The interruption was acknowledged by the Sui core team on Tuesday
source: https://www.ethnews.com/sui-mainnet-stalls-as-network-disruption-halts-block-production/

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan reiterated that a 150-basis-point rate cut is needed this year.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan reiterated the need for a 150-basis-point rate cut this year, adding that threats to the Fed would not trigger inflation. (Jinshi)

data.title: MetaMask released a video with the caption "Coming Soon," hinting at an upcoming new event.
data.description: MetaMask released a video on its official X platform with the caption "Coming Soon," hinting at an upcoming new event. It is currently unclear whether the red diamond in the video represents points for the new event or some other form of reward.

data.title: Bitcoin Open Interest Drops 31% as Analysts Call a Market Bottom and Eye $105k Breakout
data.description:
Bitcoin's open interest decline below its 180-day moving average signals a critical deleveraging phase that historically marks market bottoms, with futures positioning shifting bullish and analysts projecting a potential rally toward $105,000.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-open-interest-drops-31-as-analysts-call-a-market-bottom-and-eye-105k-breakout/
